highlights:
🐓
France beat Morocco
France 2–0 Morocco
📅 Thu Jul 9 · Boston
Job done for France, a composed 2–0 win over Morocco in the quarterfinal with Mbappe (60') and Dembele (66').
🇨🇭
Switzerland win on penalties
Switzerland 0–0 Colombia
📅 Tue Jul 7 · Vancouver
Ice-cold from twelve yards, Switzerland saw off Colombia on penalties (4–3 pens) after 0–0 in the Round of 16.
💙
Argentina come from behind vs Egypt
Argentina 3–2 Egypt
📅 Tue Jul 7 · Atlanta
Backs to the wall, Argentina rallied to see off Egypt 3–2 in the Round of 16, Romero (79'), Messi (83') and Fernandez (90'+2') turning it around.
😈
Ketelaere's brace sinks United States
United States 1–4 Belgium
📅 Tue Jul 7 · Seattle
Ketelaere struck twice in the first half (0', 33') as Belgium beat United States 4–1 in the Round of 16, with Vanaken (57') and Lukaku (90'+3') also on the mark.
🐂
Spain edge Portugal
Portugal 0–1 Spain
📅 Mon Jul 6 · Dallas
Heartbreak for Portugal, Spain nicked it 1–0 late in the Round of 16, Merino (90'+1') on target.
🦁
Bellingham's brace sinks Mexico
Mexico 2–3 England
📅 Mon Jul 6 · Mexico City
Bellingham struck twice in the first half (36', 38') as England beat Mexico 3–2 in the Round of 16, with Kane (60' pen) also on the mark.

Actual path — feeder line of the real result
